title: antirrhinum majus var. litigiosum
intro: Antirrhinum majus var. litigiosum, commonly known as the lipflower or litigous snapdragon, is a variety of the Antirrhinum majus plant, characterized by its distinctive shape and vibrant colors. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects, making it effective in treating a range of health issues such as wounds, respiratory problems, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Antirrhinum majus var. litigiosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and support the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
